Set in the centre of Umag only 150 metres from the Old Town and 50 metres from the sea, Apartments Riva offers air-conditioned accommodation located with free Wi-Fi. The nearest beach is just 300 metres away. A variety of dining options can be found within a walking distance.
All apartments comprise a living room with flat-screen cable TV and an equipped kitchen with a dishwasher and dining area. They include a bathroom with shower and hairdryer, while the bedrooms offers sea views.
On the ground floor of the building there is a car rental agency, as well as a bar with terrace. Next to the property stops a sightseeing train which goes around the town, to the beaches and ATP tennis courts, located 2 km away.
Local bus stops 150 metres away, while the Bus Station is 700 metres away.
